title: onobrychis × wachteri
intro: Onobrychis × wachteri, also known as Wachter's sainfoin, is a hybrid plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae), resulting from the cross between the sainfoin (Onobrychis viciifolia) and the Persian clover (Trifolium resupinatum). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory agent and its potential in treating digestive issues. The health benefits of Onobrychis × wachteri include its capacity to help manage symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders and its potential in improving the health of the gut microbiome. Onobrychis × wachteri can be prepared as an herbal supplement, with its dried leaves and flowers often used in teas, infusions, and capsules.
